title: MKS Immigration Lawyers - Canadian Immigration Lawyers
content:
## Canadian Immigration Lawyers

## BC’s Immigration Law Firm
Consistently recognized as one of Canada’s top immigration law firms, we are British Columbia’s immigration law firm. We are a team of compassionate, trusted industry leaders with a track record of success. Whether you’re a business looking to scale up with key foreign professionals, an international student looking for ways to stay in Canada or a Canadian seeking to bring family members from abroad, we can help. Check out our Practice Areas page for more information on how we can help you.

## We speak your language
Our multilingual team is pleased to serve you in more than eight languages.
